title: Oral-B Complete Replacement Heads 2 Count (3 Pack)
description: Product Description Oral-B Complete Deep Clean Replacement Toothbrush Heads feature a Rotating Powerhead and CrissCross Bristles that reach deep between teeth to lift out and sweep away plaque. Brush heads should be replaced every 3 months, compatible with Oral-B Complete Pro-Health and 3D White Battery Powered Toothbrushes. Replacement directions on back of packaging for easy install. Warnings Safety Warning: Not intended for children 3 years and under.

reviews.title: Great if you have an older model Oral B
reviews.text: I like that I finally found these replacement heads.  They're hard to come by.  I thought I'd have to buy a new toothbrush. They have a larger head than most other electric toothbrushes. Half rotating and half fixed.

title: oogiebear 360° Toothbrush - Training Toothbrush for Babies. Safe Ultra Soft Silicone Toothbrush with Teddy Bear Baby Gum Relief and Gum Massaging Base. Baby Must Haves. BPA Free
features: MAKES BRUSHING SAFE AND BEAR-ABLE - oogiebear’s adorable and innovative baby toothbrush provides better baby oral care and makes brushing tiny teeth fun with a soft bristle brush and bear head design that ensures it never goes in too deep.

FUN AND FUNCTIONAL DESIGN - oogiebear’s unique 360 degree toothbrush effectively cleans teeth and gums with short soft bristles. The soft silicone base is easy for baby to hold while premium grade silicone bumps stimulate gums.

BABY’S FIRST TOOTHBRUSH - Made for babies 3 months and older, oogiebear toothbrush is the perfect tool to get your baby used to brushing before graduating to their first big-kid toothbrush. Its stand-up base makes it easy to clean and store.

SUPERIOR QUALITY - oogiebear toothbrush is made with the highest quality food-grade silicone. Its extra-soft bristles are fun to chew and won’t break off or cause choking while its base has a silky touch that’s soothing to gums.

DOCTOR DESIGNED, MOM TESTED, PERIODONTIST APPROVED - Created by a registered pharmacist and mother and periodontist dad, oogiebear toothbrush is designed to make learning to brush easier for parents and baby for a lifetime of bright beautiful smiles.

reviews.title: Adorable toothbrush and great teether as well but pricey
reviews.text:
This toothbrush/teether is BPA free and made of soft silicone. The head of the cute bear prevents the toothbrush piece from going too far into the baby's mouth but it is still long enough to act as a teether and also massage the gums. Babies usually do not start getting teeth until about 6 months so it can help the child get used to the first steps of "brushing their teeth." The current price of $12.99 ($15.99 minus $3) is a bit pricey for this.

Always supervise during use and be careful to clean this regularly. Because the brush area is grooved, it is important to give this a vigorous cleaning in that area as food, lint, etc. can get caught in that area depending on where the baby puts it.

reviews.title: Convenient, choke-proof baby toothbrush and teether
reviews.text: The whole thing is designed so that baby can't choke on it no matter which part she puts in her mouth.  The whole 'handle' is bendy silicone, which she also likes as a teether.  The wide bear head makes it easy for her to grab and hold onto it.  The brush is on all sides that you don't have to keep turning it around to get both upper and lower teeth, and still goes in enough to brush her tongue and gums.  It's all about the convenience.

reviews.title: Baby toothbrush
reviews.text: Baby now has two adorable teeth and we just started using this toothbrush before bed every night. Not sure how this is supposed to work because we don’t use toothpaste but he laughs and laughs so we love using it. It’s such a cute part of his bedtime routine and as he gets older he will hopefully have a great association with brushing his teeth and dental hygiene because of this

reviews.title: It was a gift
reviews.text: It was a gift to my nieces son. She said he loves it. He’s only 6 months but it’s never too early to teach. She said he won’t let it go.

reviews.title: Well designed kids toothbrush
reviews.text: Very useful toothbrush. I got it for my 8 month old who already has a few teeth. I love the design. It is relatively large, which makes it easier to my baby to hold and shew in. Since the brush is round, it works from all angles. I highly recommend it.

reviews.title: Great value for the money sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Great adult sonic toothbrush for a nice value. One thing to note is this vibrates rather than spins. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. Regardless, I enjoy using it. It comes with 6 replacement heads for a 18 month supply, which is pretty impressive. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. 60+ day charge. Nice black color. Easy to use & charge. Great value for the money.

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

reviews.title: Attractive yellow color!
reviews.text: First of all, I love this bright yellow colored electric toothbrush! A refreshing change from the regular black and  white sonic electric toothbrushes that are on the market right now! The bristles are ordinary but the extra brush heads make up for it. The price is just the same like the regular sonic brushes right now so it is worth a try!

reviews.title: Strong Vibration
reviews.text: Works well with strong vibration. Timer works well with 30 seconds intervals. Brushes well with soft bristles. The only thing that I personally don't like is the slippery handle. Otherwise it is a good product. Shipping was fast.

reviews.title: The Yellow is Very Cheerful
reviews.text: This is a nice electric toothbrush for the price. It has multiple settings (clean, soft, polish, massage, and white), although I tend to leave it on white most of the time. The sunny yellow color is really quite cheerful and is a bright start to the day. The bristles are softer than others I've used, which is nice for those of us who tend to brush too hard. I really like that the brush head (and even the bristles) match the body... all in the same sunny yellow. I'm also impressed that it came with so many replacement brush heads, each with their own cover. I won't need to buy replacements for a long time! I'm pretty impressed overall.

reviews.title: Really Like It!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is sleek and powerful and I really like all of the different settings. It has a good battery life - I have only had to charge it twice so far.

title: Kank-A Soft Brush Tooth Mouth Pain Gel Maximum Strength, White, 0.21 Oz, Pack of 3
description: Kank-A SoftBrush is the first oral pain treatment to deliver medication in a unique, self-contained brush-tipped dispenser. The sleek, pen-like applicator makes it easier than ever to comfortably and precisely target pain - including between teeth and braces. The no-drip, ultra-soft brush applies the pain-relieving gel evenly and directly to sore areas, with a comfortable touch that won't irritate or aggravate the area. SoftBrush delivers medication in a mild, pleasant tasting gel to treat pain caused by toothaches and minor irritation of the mouth and gums, including irritation from braces, dentures and other orthodontic appliances. The dual relief formula contains a maximum strength anesthetic combined with an active oral astringent for fast, effective relief.
features: 0.07 Ounce(pack of 3);PAIN RELIEF: Stops tooth and gum pain from toothaches, irritation from braces and dentures, and canker sores on contact
UNIQUE PEN-LIKE BRUSH APPLICATOR: Makes it easy to get to those hard to reach areas comfortably
DUAL MEDICATIONS: Combines two analgesics for dual relief
PLEASANT TASTE: SoftBrush gel formula has no unpleasant taste, tackiness, or sting
ON-THE-GO TREATMENT: Slender design fits well in hand and travels well in purse or pocket

reviews.title: Love!
reviews.text: Great value for the price, quantity, and quantity. Exactly what you’d get if you purchased in store. Helps with pain! Especially helps with pain from wisdom teeth. It does wear off, but I just reapply. FOLLOW THE DIRECTIONS! Do not keep reapplying more than what is recommended!

reviews.title: This works for numbing
reviews.text: This really relieves the pain, at least for awhile.  I don't think it works so much to heal but no pain is a good thing.

reviews.title: Gets inbetween teeth well.
reviews.text: I tried it for my teeth pain, turns out i have Trigeminal neuralgia and im just feeling pain in my teeth, i gave it to my brother for his tooth pain, he ended up coming back for the other two (i ordered 3) works great. Gets in those hard to reach places.

reviews.title: Totally worth the price/for best results...dry your canker before applying gel
reviews.text:
I suffer from Canker sores all the time. I get them so bad, it hurts to even speak.
My sister actually turned me on to Kank-A Tooth/Mouth Pain Gel,. It really works.
Of course I had to figure out how to use it in a way that better suits me.
Best Way to use it: When you feel that canker coming on in your mouth....dry that area as much as possible. Use either a cotton ball or a tissue to dry the surface area where the sore is. The dryer the spot, the better contact you can make with the Kank-A SoftBrush Tooth/Mouth Pain Gel, Apply the gel directly to your canker sore and give it a little time to actually start drying on the sore. Sometimes you do have to sit there with your tongue out- but if you want to treat it fast and get the gel into the sore better, its worth it. Once the gel is pretty much set in, you can go back to your normal routine. You will have to reapply it a few times a day.
For the best maximum treatment and results, put it on your Canker right before going to sleep. The gel will have time to work its magic while you sleep...totally recommend using this.

reviews.title: Works great but not for long
reviews.text: It does numb the pain at first but doesn't last as long as the beads.  Maybe that's not the point... maybe it shouldn't last too long... it's a numbing agent.

reviews.title: LOVE THESE BABY TOOTHBRUSHES!
reviews.text: I love everything from this brand. Mushie has the best baby silicone products and I wish I had bought the other products from Amazon so that I can write these reviews! I've been skeptical about using the cotton baby toothbrushes because I don't want any lint staying in my baby's mouth or it slipping off and be a potential choking hazard. This silicone toothbrush fits perfectly on my finger and makes it so much easier to brush his teeth rather than using a toothbrush and worrying about scraping the roof of his mouth. It's soft all around and has a silicone brush side to brush and a bumpy side for better gum stimulation. It comes in a pack of two and this brand has various modern colors. I highly recommend this product for infant brushing!

features: A Cleaner Clean and Brighter, Whiter Smile - Improve your brushing routine with Better & Better’s Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for adults equipped with soft, natural, plant-based bristles made from castor bean oil. Our sonic toothbrush produces up to 38,000 microvibrations per minute for high polish and gentle clean. Choose from its 5 cleaning modes depending on your brushing needs.

Smart, Seamless & More Powerful Cleaning - Our bamboo electric toothbrush for adults features a 2-minute dentist-recommended timer with 30-second interval pulses. Flaunt your unique smile with the help of the sonic toothbrush's 5 cleaning modes: cleaning (default) for removing plaque, whitening for improving surface color, polishing mode for brightening your front teeth, milder for gentle gum massage, and sensitive for a super gentle mode for sensitive teeth and gums.

A Better Brushing Routine - The bamboo sonic toothbrush’s cleaning modes and plant-based bristles are safe to use on braces and dental restorations (fillings, crowns, veneers, or implants). Our electric toothbrush for adults is certified cruelty-free and comes in recyclable packaging.

Designed for Optimal Brushing Experience - Our bamboo electric sonic brush comes with replaceable bamboo heads. The entire brush is waterproof, so you can use it in the shower. The long-lasting and rechargeable battery also makes this the perfect travel toothbrush to keep your routine tip top on the go. You only need to charge it every 30-40 days when your routine consists of brushing twice, morning and night.

Better for You. Better for the Planet - We set out to make toothbrushes that are good in every way. Our unique natural bamboo brush heads create less waste when replaced. We prioritize the health of our bodies and our planet, which leads us to imagine entirely new ways of doing things. And as we minimize the ecological effects of our products and packaging, we create a better world.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush ever.
reviews.text:
I’ve used Sonicare Diamondclean for years - but after trying this one, I’ll never go back. It’s gentler, cleans better, and less than half the price of Diamondclean. I love the bamboo, the soft bristles. The only thing I wish it had two buttons (one for on/off, one for the settings), and a wireless induction charging base.
But as is I still love it.

reviews.title: Bamboo sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Good, sonic (vibrations rather than spinning) toothbrush. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. It comes with only 2 replacement heads which deducts a star as I expect at least 4. It does comes with a toothbrush holder stand to recharge with a 30-40 day battery life. Many of these brushes only come with a ubs cable, so the included toothbrush holder is a great addition. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. This toothbrush is unique as it is made with bamboo making it a more natural product!

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

title: Oral-B 8000 Electric Toothbrush with Bluetooth Connectivity, White
description: Use the Oral-B App to seamlessly pair your Genius 8000 with a smartphone and you're on your way to brushing like your dentist recommends. The Oral-B Genius 8000 comes with Position Detection technology which uses Bluetooth technology, your smartphone, and facial recognition technology to provide you with real-time feedback about your brushing habits. The 360 Smarting with LED lights allows you to personalize your brushing experience with your choice of 12 colors. The Smarting works with the integrated timer and pressure sensor to provide you with visual feedback on brushing time and brushing pressure. Together, they help you ensure you brush for the recommended 2-minutes while making sure you brush with appropriate pressure to protect your gums from over-brushing. The premium Smart Travel Case lets you charge your brush and smartphone (via USB) at the same time while using only one wall plug. The Genius features 6 brushing modes so you can further customize your brushing experience based on your specific oral care goals. This highly advanced brush features a dentist-inspired round head that surrounds and cups each tooth with dynamic oscillating, rotating and pulsating movements to remove up to 500% more plaque than a regular manual toothbrush. Trust in the precision engineering of Braun and the dental expertise of Oral-B, the #1 brand used and recommended by dentists worldwide. 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed.
features: Position Detection to help you know where you've brushed, so you never miss a zone
Multicolor Smarting on electric toothbrush provides coaching on brushing time
Pressure sensor technology slows brush speed to protect gums
Rechargeable with 6 cleaning modes allow you to brush based on your needs
Smart Travel toothbrush case for dual cell phone and brush handle charging

reviews.title: Tb
reviews.text: Stop working after two months. What a waste.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text:
for a top model priced as such, i was a disappointed in the feature set....no UV system to sterilize the brush head. Travel pack and main stand run on two different power systems...travel pack runs on 100-240v (universal) and main stand only runs on 110v (NA).

Does anyone know the point of the tongue mode being at the very bottom of the mode switch list? i brush my teeth and brush my tongue so the tongue mode should have been immediately after the regular brush mode

a few days use on a single charge. great build. grippy soft handle.

reviews.title: Some new features, brush works well.
reviews.text: This toothbrush is much like my old one, only this one is black. It does have a blue tooth thing that is so-so. It was a little cumbersome to get the app to work, (and had to get a new phone). The interaction between myself, the tooth brush, and the phone seems to be lacking. I envisioned real time brushing animation or something. This just times you through the selected areas. It is nice to get the bushing too hard feature well to know its there, and works. I miss the second speed my old one had this one only has one speed. I like that I can use my phone to help to remind me of my brushing responsibilities. The travel case is a nice feature as well. The design and function of this brush works well as does my old one. I was just expecting something a little more.

reviews.title: Very Good
reviews.text: Product arrived in time and exactly as presented on amazon

reviews.title: powerful toothbrush but a bit gimmicky
reviews.text:
I upgraded to this toothbrush from a vibrating-head type. The difference in cleaning-power feels dramatic. It has several different speeds for brushing teeth, gums, tongue, etc. By default, the light will blink and the toothbrush pause at certain intervals to ensure you spend enough time brushing different areas. This can be further customized with the Bluetooth unit and application. This is a neat novelty, and may be good for encouraging children to learn to brush correctly. To be honest though, when in a rush in the morning, I am not likely to take the extra step of using a phone app while brushing my teeth, and I also prefer not to take up another plug, as it’s not integrated with the charging base.

Overall I like the toothbrush a lot, but next time around, I would likely get the less expensive model without the phone accessories.

Which is why they can’t get to all the areas of the mouth properly. They make good teething tool and starter toothbrushes for kids close to 12 months or so.

reviews.title: Great for little boys who don’t brush well
reviews.text: My son is horrible at brushing his teeth. He does it often, just has a hard time getting every crevice. He shakes this around back and fourth while in his mouth and gets them nice and clean. 10/10 would recommend.

reviews.title: Way too small…
reviews.text: Way smaller than I had hoped for. Tiny toothbrushes the toothbrushes looks like they’ve been cut in half. That would have been fine but the toothbrush head is so tiny, I appreciate that these are compostable but I just feel like this could have been done better. The packaging seems great, however these arrived in a plastic Amazon bag, so it sort cancel’s out the intention. So I’m a little disappointed and will unfortunately bring my plastic traveling toothbrush just incase this one doesn’t work for me. So tiny for a 6 day trip! I won’t use the pills, I just bought these for the compostable toothbrushes, so I can’t really comment on those.

reviews.title: Great toothbrush!
reviews.text: I was given one by my oral surgeon and have since used nothing else. Used properly gives you a clean like you just left the hygienist.

reviews.title: My dentist recommends!
reviews.text: This is the toothbrush my dentist recommends. I really, really like it! I'm very glad to have found it here so I can change it out as often as she wants me to.

reviews.title: Love these toothbrushes

reviews.title: Nothing special, won't buy again
reviews.text:
I could find nothing particularly special about these. They don't clean my teeth better than any other toothbrush thar I have picked up at the grocery store in the past.
Not worth the price. They aren't angled properly to reach the base of my back teeth. Regret getting these vs something like a "Reach" brand that is angled.

reviews.title: Very soft bristles
reviews.text: I always love the Soft toothbrush my dentist gave me.  They changed it so I had to search for different soft toothbrushes for myself.  Found these and it’s definitely very soft bristles.  Highly recommended.  They give you five in package.
